title: Sterling X-Large Aluminium Foil Roasting Trays 40cm - Extra Deep Disposable Catering Pans for Turkey & Christmas Roasts - Pack of 6
features: Extra-large aluminium roasting trays ideal for Christmas turkey, BBQ and catering – deep, strong and oven ready for large-meal cooking.
Extra-thick aluminium construction delivers reliable stability for large roasts, catering events and Christmas meals.
Suitable for Christmas turkey, large roasts, BBQ meals, catering pans and event food preparation, offering dependable multi-use functionality.
Clean-up is effortless thanks to the disposable design, making these trays ideal for Christmas gatherings, BBQs and food service.
Space-saving stackable design helps maintain an organised kitchen, while multi-packs deliver excellent value for large roasts and event cooking.
description: STERLING Heavy Duty Aluminium Foil Roasting Trays 40cm – Pack of 6 For families that cook regularly and for hosts who love entertaining, these STERLING 40cm x 34cm x 5cm heavy-duty aluminium roasting trays offer excellent strength, capacity and value. This pack of 6 provides a generous supply of durable, oven-ready trays ideal for large meals, batch cooking, BBQs and small-scale catering. Why this Pack of 6 is a top choice for larger meals Wide 40cm cooking surface – perfect for roasting larger cuts of meat, poultry portions, vegetables and family-size traybakes. Heavy-duty aluminium foil – engineered to stay rigid and leak-resistant even when loaded with heavier foods. 5cm deep sides – allow sauces, marinades and juices to be safely contained for cleaner cooking. Ideal for oven, BBQ & smoker use – a reliable choice for roasting, grilling, pre-cooking and serving. Excellent bulk value – ideal for families, meal preppers, BBQ hosts and event organisers. Perfect for gatherings, BBQs & weekend roasting This versatile tray is ideal for family roasts, BBQ feasts, gatherings, parties, church events, office meals and community functions . The sturdy aluminium finish also makes them suitable for serving food directly from oven to table. Convenient disposable design for easy cleanup Avoid scrubbing large roasting pans after cooking. These disposable trays offer a quick, hygienic and time-saving cleanup option. Once cooled, recycle where possible or dispose responsibly. Suggested uses Large meat joints, turkey pieces and whole chicken roasting Roast potatoes, vegetables, casseroles and pasta bakes BBQ cooking, drip trays and warming pans Buffet service and serving trays for events Meal prep and bulk cooking sessions Pack contents 6 x STERLING heavy duty aluminium roasting trays – approx. 40cm x 34cm x 5cm (L x W x H) .
